role: Brigadier General; Deputy Head of Armed Forces Intelligence
bio: Saleh Asadi was a Brigadier General serving as Deputy Head of Armed Forces Intelligence under the [General Staff of the Armed Forces](/orgs/general-staff-of-the-armed-forces). He was killed on 28 February 2026 in the combined US-Israel decapitation strikes that also killed Supreme Leader [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) and multiple senior military commanders. His death was part of a systematic effort to destroy Iran's intelligence and military command infrastructure during the [February 28, 2026 strikes](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-feb-2026).
editorial_notes: Brigadier General, Deputy Head of Armed Forces Intelligence. Killed 28 Feb 2026 in US/Israel decapitation strikes.
